mapper.sql: AUTH_ID, ROLE_ID, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3
mapper.insert: insert into TBL_ROLE_AUTH (AUTH_ID, ROLE_ID, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3) values (#{authId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into TBL_ROLE_AUTH
AUTH_ID,
ROLE_ID,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
#{authId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update TBL_ROLE_AUTH
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where AUTH_ID = #{authId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and ROLE_ID = #{roleId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
